case_title: JUN WEI MA VS. SUZANNE HOO LEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, JUN WEI AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUZANNE HOO AN INDIVIDUAL NEW ON SANG A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, JUN WEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, SUZANNE HOO AN INDIVIDUAL $3,881.20 PRINCIPAL, $177.58 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,263.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
